title: Removing Workspace membership restriction to Tidy Up
excerpt: Currently an admin can only archive boards in the Tidy Up feature if they are a member of the Workspace. So, admin need to be a member of ALL Workspaces in their environment in order to maintain a clean system, which mak…

posts.author: sbuhman (Shannon Buhman)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently an admin can only archive boards in the Tidy Up feature if they are a member of the Workspace. So, admin need to be a member of ALL Workspaces in their environment in order to maintain a clean system, which makes their daily non-admin use of the tool to be very cumbersome if there are a lot of Workspaces. Can the Monday.com team consider changing this setting so admin can successfully archive Boards in Tidy Up no matter if they’re a member of the Workspace or not?
